validated_findings.statement: DB_GLOBAL_INVENTARIO.xlsx BASE has four formula-derived columns (COD_RT, NOMBRE_LOCAL_RR, OTROS, duplicados) and eight direct source columns; the loader reads saved values rather than evaluating Excel formulas.
evidence: BASE table Tabla1 A1:L43636
Workbook XML formulas in columns I:J:K:L
Formula caches present for I,J,L and absent for K in XML inspection
scripts/load_fact_from_excel.py reads workbook values through pandas/openpyxl path

validated_findings.statement: The BASE duplicados column is ignored by the loader; deduplication is performed in Python and enforced again by the DB upsert conflict key.
evidence: scripts/load_fact_from_excel.py source_check treats extra columns as warnings
scripts/load_fact_from_excel.py drop_duplicates path
ON CONFLICT (fecha, cod_rt, sku, marca)
DB constraint on public.fact_stock_venta (fecha, cod_rt, sku, marca)

validated_findings.statement: COD_RT depends on an Excel XLOOKUP over RUTA_RUTERO for each BASE row, so stale saved formula values can be ingested silently by the loader.
evidence: COD_RT formula uses XLOOKUP with CADENA, COD B2B/N_LOCAL, CLIENTE/MARCA conditions
BASE has 43635 data rows
RUTA_RUTERO has 3568 data rows
No formula-recency or formula-cache validation in scripts/load_fact_from_excel.py

validated_findings.statement: The ruta loader computes row_hash as an analysis fingerprint and explicitly does not use it as the upsert key.
evidence: scripts/load_ruta_rutero_from_excel.py row_hash comment says it is not the UPSERT key
public.ruta_rutero upsert key is (source, source_row)
row_hash written to public.ruta_rutero and cg_core.ruta_rutero_load_rows

validated_findings.statement: The ruta loader writes the current routing table plus full load history and batch metadata; DB profile confirms accumulated route load batches.
evidence: Loader targets public.ruta_rutero, cg_core.ruta_rutero_load_rows, cg_core.ruta_rutero_load_batch
DB profile: ruta_rutero_load_batch rows=19
DB profile: ruta_rutero_load_rows rows=64346

validated_findings.statement: The CG raw loader uses source sheet hash checks and batch_registry, so unchanged sheets can be skipped while changed sheets create batch records.
evidence: scripts/load_control_gestion_raw_v17.py hash/check logic
DB profile: cg_audit.batch_registry has 37 batches across DB (KPIONE), DB (KPIONE2.0), DB (POWER_APP)
No loader execution was performed

validated_findings.statement: The incremental refresh rebuilds daily and weekly mart facts through staged validation before commit; the data mutation transaction commits before a separate best-effort ANALYZE step.
evidence: scripts/refresh_control_gestion_v2_incremental.py stages daily and weekly data
Validation failures before conn.commit roll back
conn.commit occurs before post-commit ANALYZE; ANALYZE failures produce warning after rollback of analyze transaction

validated_findings.statement: Home.py defers app/db.py, exports, and screen imports inside main(), so those modules are not imported by Home.py at module import time.
evidence: app/Home.py imports db, exports, and screen modules inside main()
No equivalent module-level imports found outside main()

validated_facts: DB_GLOBAL_INVENTARIO.BASE has four formula-derived columns and the loader reads saved values.
The duplicados column is redundant for the loader but may still have manual workbook meaning.
CUMPLIMIENTO_FRECUENCIA loader consumption is limited to DB (KPIONE), DB (KPIONE2.0), and DB (POWER_APP).
The ruta loader writes current route, full route load history, and batch metadata.
CG raw loader hash-skip and batch_registry behavior is validated at static/aggregate level.
not_absorbed_as_truth: Removal of payload_json from cg_raw tables
Claim that DB_HISTORICA has BASE-identical schema
